metadata.name: pygame-tools-tafh
metadata.summary: Advanced game engine built upon pygame. Includes such things like tweens, game objects, scenes, etc.

modules.name: pygame_tools_tafh.exceptions
documentation: Use only if everything is bad.

classes.name: pygame_tools_tafh.game_object.Prefab
documentation: Saves all the data about the object. Can be saved or loaded from the file.

classes.name: pygame_tools_tafh.game_object.GameObjectData
documentation: Shorthand way to register a prefab to scene.

methods.name: pygame_tools_tafh.camera.Camera._normalize
documentation: Normalizes pos coordinates to relative to camera coordinates.

classes.name: pygame_tools_tafh.vmath.angle.Angle
documentation: class that represent angles in radians

classes.name: pygame_tools_tafh.vmath.vector.Vector2d
documentation: Class to represent a pair of floats.
